## Definition of Done
- [ ] Tests written first; coverage ≥ 85% on touched files
- [ ] `dotnet format` clean
- [ ] All CI checks green
- [ ] Security scans clean (deps, SAST, secrets, container)
- [ ] OpenAPI updated (if API surface changed)
- [ ] Docs / ADR updated (if material)
- [ ] Constitution compliance verified
- [ ] PR diff < 500 lines
